description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fluent.runtime that runs on push and pull requests to the master branch, specifically for files in the fluent.runtime directory, excluding docs. The workflow has two jobs: unit and lint. The unit job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for Python versions 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, and pypy3, and fluent-syntax version 0.18.1, with an exception for Python 3.9 and fluent-syntax 0.17.0. It checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests. The lint job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.9, installs flake8, and runs linting on the fluent directory.
